## Release — Blackhole v0.5.0

### ✨ What's new in v0.5.0

This release rebrands the product to **Blackhole**, hardens build integrity after a real CI
incident, and ships an Antigravity/Gemini distribution bundle.

#### Blackhole rebrand

- **Full identity rename** — `bc-campaign` → `blackhole` across agents (`bc-coordinator` →
  `coordinator`, etc.), skill slug, runtime state directory (`.bc-campaign/` → `.blackhole/`),
  slash command (`/bc-campaign run` → `/blackhole run`), git branch prefix, and marketplace name
- **GitHub repository renamed** — `CorentinLumineau/backlog-campaign` →
  `CorentinLumineau/blackhole` (old URL redirects automatically)
- **Hard cutover, no compatibility shim** — `bun run doctor` / `bun run install:verify` extended
  to detect *both* prior naming generations (`backlog-campaign` and `bc-campaign`) as legacy,
  pointing installs at `blackhole`
- **Manual migration documented** — existing `.bc-campaign/` installs: `mv .bc-campaign .blackhole`
  (see README "Migrating from bc-campaign")

#### Build integrity

- **`V-BUILD-01` hardened** — `bun run verify` now actually fails when `bun run build` leaves any
  tracked build-output path dirty, closing the gap that let a stale-manifest regression reach
  `main` undetected in the previous cycle
- **Generated-file markers** — every compiled mirror file (agents, skills, rules, references, per
  platform) carries an in-file "generated, do not hand-edit" comment, so a stray edit is visible
  before it's silently lost on the next build
- **`checkCodexBuild` split** — the 115-line, 4-V-code Codex verify check was split into four
  single-purpose functions; a duplicated `rulesList` array is now single-sourced from `build.ts`

#### Antigravity / Gemini distribution

- **`plugins/blackhole/`** — a proper redistributable Antigravity plugin bundle (`plugin.json` +
  `skills/` + `rules/`, no `agents/` per the plugin schema), verified by a new `V-GEMINI-02` check,
  and built to stay independently deletable from the existing workspace-tree manifest (the exact
  coupling that broke on a previous revert)

#### Workstation tooling

- **`bun run install:verify`** — read-only platform-health matrix (Cursor, Claude Code, Gemini,
  Codex, skills.sh, `~/.agents/skills/`, broken symlinks), each row PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL

#### Documentation

- **`documentation/architecture.md`** — repo map: build pipeline diagram, every committed target
  tree, SSOT vs. runtime-state boundaries
- **`documentation/audits/`** — platform-build-verification and architecture-coherence audits,
  covering all 5 build targets and post-rename code/doc coherence
- README, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md` refreshed for the Blackhole identity and current repository URL
- ADR-001 amended (superseded synthesizer-pipeline and state-path references); dangling ADR links
  fixed

---

**Full feature overview:** see [v0.1.0 release notes](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole/releases/tag/v0.1.0) · [README](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole#readme)
